name: @filoz/repair-ponder
description: Ponder indexer for FOC early repair inventory

scripts.dev:calibnet: pnpm --filter @filoz/repair-db build && ln -sf ponder.config.calibnet.ts ponder.config.ts && ponder dev
scripts.dev:mainnet: pnpm --filter @filoz/repair-db build && ln -sf ponder.config.mainnet.ts ponder.config.ts && ponder dev
scripts.start:calibnet: pnpm --filter @filoz/repair-db build && ln -sf ponder.config.calibnet.ts ponder.config.ts && ponder start
scripts.start:mainnet: pnpm --filter @filoz/repair-db build && ln -sf ponder.config.mainnet.ts ponder.config.ts && ponder start
scripts.codegen:calibnet: pnpm --filter @filoz/repair-db build && ln -sf ponder.config.calibnet.ts ponder.config.ts && RPC_URL=http://localhost:1235/rpc/v1 DATABASE_URL=postgres://noop:noop@localhost:5432/noop ponder codegen; rc=$?; rm -f ponder.config.ts; exit $rc
scripts.codegen:mainnet: pnpm --filter @filoz/repair-db build && ln -sf ponder.config.mainnet.ts ponder.config.ts && RPC_URL=http://localhost:1234/rpc/v1 DATABASE_URL=postgres://noop:noop@localhost:5432/noop ponder codegen; rc=$?; rm -f ponder.config.ts; exit $rc
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @filoz/repair-db build && ln -sf ponder.config.mainnet.ts ponder.config.ts && RPC_URL=http://localhost:1234/rpc/v1 DATABASE_URL=postgres://noop:noop@localhost:5432/noop ponder codegen && tsc --noEmit; rc=$?; rm -f ponder.config.ts; exit $rc
